path.style: fill: none; stroke-miterlimit: 2; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 1px;
fill: none; stroke-miterlimit: 2; stroke: rgb(120, 120, 120); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 1px;

rect.style: fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0; stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre; opacity: 1;

tspan.tspan: Global Supply Chain Footprint: Order Density by Country

text.tspan: ​Color = log10(Order Volume) | Hover = Effective Revenue, Margin, Late Rate, Avg Shipping​
